title: Falloutcraft
description:
Fallout Craft is a mod that adds in Fallout themed items, blocks,structures and more...
Explore a devastated wasteland, find bunker, and survive!
body:
![Logo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TathanDev/FalloutCraft/master/src/main/resources/falloutcraft.png)

Fallout Craft is a mod that adds in Fallout themed items, blocks,structures and more...
Explore a devastated wasteland, find bunker, and survive!

![Features](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/978717923948499055/1063485010654544052/features.png)

![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ugBW4EBl/images/dd628bba934d1d9adc8794a869ace230c2b3036e.png)

Discover a world where nothing is like before ! Play in a devastated world with the wastelands world type ! 

![Worldgen](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/629/518/2023-03-04_21.png)

Find ruins of a time before the Great War !

![Structures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ugBW4EBl/images/30dd41bba0ed7d44d29eb9aea967704d95c5a6d2.png)

## **Other Features**

- Fallout themed items (Nuka Cola, Stimpak, Radaway)
- Pimp Boy
- Radiations Water
- Fallout Paintings
- Radiated Rain
- Radiations System
- Machines (Nuka Cola Machine)
- Biomes (Need some reworks)
- Flowers (Radioactiva)
- Hazmat Suit
- New Villager
- Custom Generations

## Planned Features
- Bunkers
- Villages vaults
- Biomes (More Biomes)
- More items
- Decoration Blocks
- More Paintings
- Machines (Radiation Remover)
- Mobs (RADROACHES, Bloodbugs)
- Mods compatibility (Celestial, Patchouli, etc...)

*Thanks to Mixer555 for the structures !*
 

## FAQ
1) My inventory does not open when i want to open it !
    - You need to use the pip boy to open your inventory. This mechanic can be disable in the config 

 

 

You have an idea ? You want to help ? join my Discord server : [https://discord.gg/nuDEYcFX4j](https://discord.gg/nuDEYcFX4j)
